dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses MA line as dynamic support/resistance in trending contexts. Used sma_50 as representative MA (period unspecified by author). Entry conditions detect uptrend/downtrend via price position relative to MA and MA slope direction. Retracement entry triggered by price crossing toward MA line. Exit conditions reversed from entry (MA line breach signals trend exhaustion). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as logic switches between LONG and SHORT based on trend identification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses MA line as dynamic support/resistance in trending contexts. Used sma_50 as representative MA (period unspecified by author). Entry conditions detect uptrend/downtrend via price position relative to MA and MA slope direction. Retracement entry triggered by price crossing toward MA line. Exit conditions reversed from entry (MA line breach signals trend exhaustion). Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as logic switches between LONG and SHORT based on trend identification.

source_rule_text: In an uptrend, buy when price retraces to the MA line (which acts as support); in a downtrend, sell when price rallies to the MA line (which acts as resistance).
